audit.skip_reason: Backend and frontend services were offline

escalations.title: Handlebars.js Multiple Code Injection CVEs
escalations.exploit_scenario: Attacker-controlled template content executes arbitrary JavaScript on server, achieving full RCE
escalations.impact: Complete server compromise, all in-memory data accessible
escalations.escalation_reason: Code injection / RCE requiring security code review of all template handling before upgrade

escalations.title: protobufjs Arbitrary Code Execution
escalations.fix_command: cd platform/orchestrator && npm list protobufjs && npm install [parent-package]@latest
escalations.exploit_scenario: Network attacker sends crafted malformed protobuf message to exposed orchestrator service triggering RCE in the pipeline infrastructure process
escalations.impact: Full compromise of pipeline orchestrator, all running agent containers reachable
escalations.escalation_reason: Network-exposed service with known RCE, requires security assessment before remediation
escalations.platform_note: platform/orchestrator is solo-session only per CLAUDE.md — do NOT route to pipeline agents

findings.title: FR Identifier Namespace Collision Between orchestrator-cycle-dashboard and image-upload Plans
findings.detail: Both plans independently assigned FR-070 through FR-076 to completely different features. Traceability enforcer will false-pass both if either plan is implemented.
findings.recommendation: Create Plans/fr-registry.md mapping every FR ID to its owning plan. Rename orchestrator-cycle-dashboard to FR-OCD-001..007. Add enforcer duplicate-ID detection.

findings.title: Three Approved Plans Unimplemented in Source/
findings.detail: orchestrator-cycle-dashboard: 7 FRs (0% in Source/). image-upload: 20 FRs implemented in portal/ only. duplicate-deprecated-status: 13 FRs, portal/ schema only (FR-DUP-08).
findings.recommendation: Route orchestrator-cycle-dashboard to TheFixer for implementation. Clarify scope of image-upload and duplicate-deprecated-status (portal/ vs Source/) and annotate requirements accordingly.

findings.title: Traceability Enforcer Only Validates Most-Recently-Modified Plan
findings.detail: Enforcer uses max(req_files, key=os.path.getmtime) — currently resolves to Plans/self-judging-workflow. Three approved plans silently bypass the CI gate.
findings.recommendation: Update enforcer to iterate all requirements.md files containing 'Verdict: APPROVED' and validate each one. Add a traceability-passed.json manifest for incremental CI.

findings.title: Specifications/ Directory Disconnected from Source/
findings.detail: dev-workflow-platform.md (482 lines) documents portal/ not Source/. workflow-engine.md (162 lines) has no FR IDs — untraceable. inspector.config.yml specs.dir points to Specifications/ creating false coverage impression.
findings.recommendation: Option A: Retrofit workflow-engine.md with FR-WF-XXX IDs matching Plans/self-judging-workflow. Option B: Annotate Specifications/ as portal/-only explicitly.

findings.title: Vite Path Traversal in .map Handling
findings.fix_command: cd Source/Frontend && npm install vite@latest vitest@latest
findings.detail: Information disclosure via optimized deps .map files. Dev-only risk but direct dependency.
findings.recommendation: Upgrade vite to >=6.4.2. Coordinate with vitest upgrade (major version jump). Run full test suite after upgrade.

findings.title: path-to-regexp ReDoS via Route Parameters
findings.detail: Malformed route parameters cause regex catastrophic backtracking (DoS). Affects network-exposed orchestrator.
findings.recommendation: Upgrade express in platform/orchestrator and portal/Backend to pull path-to-regexp >=0.1.13. Note: platform/ requires solo session.
findings.platform_note: platform/orchestrator is solo-session only per CLAUDE.md

findings.title: Frontend Hooks and Badge Components Lack Dedicated Unit Tests
findings.detail: Hooks tested only via page-level tests. Badge components have zero tests. Enum regressions invisible to CI.
findings.recommendation: Add renderHook() unit tests for hooks. Add snapshot/assertion tests for badge components. Include // Verifies: FR-XXX comments.

findings.title: Silent Error Swallow in API Client
findings.detail: .catch(() => ({})) swallows JSON parse failures — callers receive {} on malformed responses. Violates 'never swallow errors silently' architecture rule.
findings.recommendation: Log parse failure with response status before returning {}. Or re-throw and let callers handle. Add comment if suppression is intentional.

findings.title: eslint-disable Without Justification Comment
findings.detail: Both suppress react-hooks/exhaustive-deps without explanation. Cannot audit intentional vs accidental stale-closure suppression.
findings.recommendation: Add inline explanations: '// eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps -- intentional: only run on mount; fetchItems is stable (useCallback)'

findings.title: brace-expansion DoS via Zero-Step Sequences
findings.detail: Zero-step sequences cause process hang and memory exhaustion. Likely resolved automatically by parent package upgrade.
findings.recommendation: npm install brace-expansion@latest (may be automatic via parent upgrade). Verify with npm audit after handlebars update.

findings.title: esbuild CORS Bypass in Dev Server
findings.detail: Allows any website to send requests to dev server and read response. Dev-only risk.
findings.recommendation: Resolved via vite upgrade (DEP-003). Coordinate as single upgrade.

findings.title: vitest and Related Moderate CVEs
findings.detail: Multiple moderate CVEs in vitest, @vitest/mocker, vite-node. Affects development and testing only.
findings.recommendation: npm install vitest@latest. Coordinate with vite upgrade (DEP-003) as they are tightly coupled.

findings.title: Dual Logger Modules in Backend
findings.detail: Two logger modules — compat wrapper and real implementation. Creates import path inconsistency risk for new routes.
findings.recommendation: Pick one logger interface. Update utils/logger.ts to export default-compatible logger and remove logger.ts shim.

cross_reference_map.single_fix: Create Plans/fr-registry.md + update enforcer to iterate all APPROVED requirements.md files
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Eliminates ID collision risk, surfaces all unimplemented plans in CI, closes enforcer scope gap

cross_reference_map.single_fix: Trigger TheGuardians audit; after clearance upgrade handlebars >=4.7.9 and protobufjs >=7.5.5
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Eliminates two CRITICAL RCE vectors (CVSS 9.8) across backend and network-exposed orchestrator

cross_reference_map.single_fix: npm install vite@latest vitest@latest in Source/Frontend and portal/Frontend
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Resolves path traversal + CORS bypass + vitest CVEs in one coordinated upgrade

cross_reference_map.single_fix: npm install express@latest in platform/orchestrator and portal/Backend
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Pulls path-to-regexp >=0.1.13, eliminates ReDoS on network-exposed service
